Name: Snickers:
Text: Oh. You made it. And now you're just... standing there. Staring at the gap.

Name: Snickers:
Text: I've been sitting here waiting. Heights don't bother me. I'm a cat.

Name: Snickers:
Text: Cats always land on their feet. That's not reassurance, by the way. That's just physics.

Name: Snickers:
Text: I jumped off something twice this height last week. Didn't think about it once.

Name: Snickers:
Text: Whatever's on the other side is probably fine. Probably.

Name: Snickers:
Text: So. Are you going, or are you just going to stand there looking nervous?
